name: chaas-monorepo
description: CHaaS Dev Orchestrator — Levanta todo el stack con un solo comando

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" --names "DOCKER,BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev:docker" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:docker: docker compose -f chaas-backend/docker-compose.yml up postgres redis n8n n8n-worker
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgYellow.bold" --names "DOCKER,BACKEND,FRONTEND,STRIPE" "npm run dev:docker" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:stripe"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix chaas-backend && npm install --prefix chaas-frontend
